[[File:AccessibilityExtraRoyal.jpg|thumb|Accessibility Items, April 2022 announcement]] The '''Accessibility Collection''' is a [[Collections|collection]] of [[clothing]] items released in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]]. The initial release was in April 2022, but there have been additional item releases. === Availability === The Accessibility Collection is part of the [[Everyday Collection]] and '''is always available in the shop'''. == Collection == === Tops === {| class="fandom-table" style="text-align:center; width:35%" |+ Pride Flag TeeThe [[Pride Collection]] has tees, headbands, and flags for LGBTQIA+ Pride. !Color !Stones !Image |- |Disability |500 |[[File:StripedTeeDisabilityPride.png|center|frameless|thumb]] |- |Autism |300 |[[File:AutismTee.png|center|frameless|thumb]] |} ===Bottoms === None === Full Body === None ===Head=== {| class="fandom-table" style="text-align:center; width:35%" |+Hearing Aids
